subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a servant nigh-brought to the Threshold of the All-Glorious! Behold thou the infinite grace, that thou hast been guided unto this place of bounty and [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
